attributes.name: HASHI policy deny spike
attributes.description: Detects bursts of denied or blocked HASHI policy decisions.
attributes.query: labels.hashi.audit.event_type: policy and labels.hashi.audit.status: (denied or blocked)

attributes.name: HASHI high-risk egress approval required
attributes.description: Detects connector or channel egress actions requiring approval.
attributes.query: labels.hashi.audit.event_type: (connector or channel) and labels.hashi.audit.status: approval_required

attributes.name: HASHI audit exporter stale
attributes.description: Detects missing HASHI audit events over the expected exporter freshness window. Tune per deployment.
